title: Political rally in Kusheshwar Asthan draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Kusheshwar Asthan promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Kusheshwar Asthan
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Kusheshwar Asthan assembly segment.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Kusheshwar Asthan
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Kusheshwar Asthan assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
